activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If we had left earlier, we ___ the train. (catch)
activities.explanation: El resultado pasado alternativo usa «would have caught».

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: She would have replied if she ___ the message. (see)
activities.explanation: La condición pasada irreal usa past perfect: «had seen».

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If the sign had been clearer, we ___ the wrong road. (not take)
activities.explanation: El resultado negativo requiere «wouldn't have taken».

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: Maya might have accepted if the hours ___ more flexible. (be)
activities.explanation: La circunstancia laboral pasada se expresa con «had been».

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If you had backed up the folder, you ___ the files. (restore)
activities.explanation: «Could have restored» expresa la capacidad pasada que habría existido.

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If the alarm hadn't sounded, we ___ the smoke. (not notice)
activities.explanation: El resultado incierto y negativo usa «might not have noticed».

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: We could have stayed longer if the hotel ___ a free room. (have)
activities.explanation: El past perfect de «have» es «had had».

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: The match would have continued if the pitch ___. (not freeze)
activities.explanation: La condición negativa usa «hadn't frozen», con participio irregular.

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If I ___ to the warning, I wouldn't have lost the data. (listen)
activities.explanation: La acción no realizada pertenece a la condición: «had listened».

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: They ___ the fault if they had tested every component. (find)
activities.explanation: El descubrimiento alternativo usa «would have found».

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If the courier had called, I ___ at home. (stay)
activities.explanation: La permanencia en casa es el resultado pasado que no ocurrió.

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: We wouldn't have complained if the issue ___ promptly. (resolve)
activities.explanation: La condición pasiva necesita «had been resolved».

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: Had the weather improved, the ferry ___. (sail)
activities.explanation: La inversión «Had the weather improved» mantiene el resultado «would have sailed».

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If the contract ___ carefully, the ambiguity might have been noticed. (review)
activities.explanation: La revisión hipotética pasiva usa «had been reviewed».

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: They might have reached an agreement if both sides ___ more flexible. (be)
activities.explanation: La cualidad pasada irreal se expresa con «had been».

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If the sensor hadn't failed, the system ___ automatically. (shut down)
activities.explanation: El participio de «shut» no cambia: «would have shut down».

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: We could have reduced the delay if we ___ the warning sooner. (receive)
activities.explanation: La recepción anterior que no ocurrió usa «had received».

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If the samples had been labelled, they ___ mixed up. (not get)
activities.explanation: En inglés británico, el resultado negativo puede usar «wouldn't have got».

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: Had the board known the full cost, it ___ the plan. (not approve)
activities.explanation: La inversión formal exige un resultado negativo con «wouldn't have approved».

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If the data ___ independently, the error might have been caught. (verify)
activities.explanation: La verificación pasiva no realizada usa «had been verified».

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: The company might not have failed if it ___ its debts earlier. (restructure)
activities.explanation: La medida financiera pasada hipotética requiere «had restructured».

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: Had the witness arrived earlier, the hearing ___ on time. (begin)
activities.explanation: El participio de «begin» es «begun»: «would have begun».

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If we hadn't documented the change, nobody ___ its cause. (trace)
activities.explanation: La capacidad pasada alternativa se expresa con «could have traced».

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: The outcome would have been different if all participants ___ equally. (treat)
activities.explanation: La condición pasiva usa «had been treated».

activities.instructions: Complete the third conditional with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: Had the initial estimate been realistic, we ___ extra funding. (not need)
activities.explanation: El resultado negativo alternativo es «wouldn't have needed».
